title: SWEET VIEW Olive Oil Spray Bottle, 470ml 2 In 1 Glass Oil Dispenser/Pour & Sprayr Bottle, Kitchen Accessories, Kitchen Gadgets for Air Fryer, Salad, BBQ(Black)
features: 2-in-1 Design - Oil dispenser and oil sprayer, can spray oil to control grease intake and pour oil conveniently, suitable for seasoning, grilling, baking and other food preparation process. Can also be used as an vinegar Pots.
FOOD GRADE MATERIAL - BPA free PP material. Thick, unbreakable and made of lead-free glass, the clear glass allows users to easily monitor the amount of oil.

EASY TO USE- Wide mouth of the bottle makes it easy to add cooking oil. Easily cleaned by hand or in the dishwasher and reusable.470ml capacity is moderate to minimize the number of oil fills without being too bulky.
HEALTHY LIVING- Cooking Sprayer can help control the amount of oil when pouring or spraying, thus controlling the amount of fat intake for human body. Let's maintain a healthy lifestyle.

COMFORTABLE USE EXPERIENCE- The front protruding nozzle is designed to get a fine, even and pure oil mist, and it is not easy to flow down the spout. The rear-mounted comfort grip allows users to pour or spray oil without getting their hands dirty, ensuring a clean, dirt-free pouring or spraying experience.
